raw_consumer_statement:
I booked roundtrip flights for myself and my family through American Express XXXX ( Booking Confirmation # : XXXX ), totaling {$6300.00}. The itinerary was from XXXX XXXX ( SFO ) to XXXX ( XXXX ), departing XX/XX/XXXX, and returning XX/XX/XXXX. 

Unfortunately, due to my childs visa rejection, we were unable to travel. Prior to the flights departure, I contacted American Express Travel customer support to inquire about cancellation and refund options. I was explicitly told that since visa rejection is considered a valid reason for cancellation, I was eligible for a full refund, provided the cancellation was done more than four hours before departure. 

Relying on this guidance, I canceled our tickets well within the required time window. 

Since then, American Express has failed to process my refund. It has now been almost XXXX months, during which I have contacted Amex Travel and Customer Service XXXX times, if not more. Each time, Ive had to repeat the entire situation to a new agent. Despite assurances that they were following up and would provide an update in 1-2 business days, I have yet to receive a proactive response or resolution.

I have been repeatedly told that they are waiting for a response from the airline. However, it was American Express that communicated the refund terms and initiated the cancellation. They continue to withhold my funds without justification or timely resolution.

Harm Suffered : - Financial Loss : {$6300.00} has been withheld for nearly four months.

- Loss of Potential Interest : I have lost potential interest I could have earned on these funds.

- Emotional Distress : This situation has caused significant and unnecessary stress for me and my family. 
- Time Wasted : I have spent considerable time repeatedly contacting American Express, explaining the issue, and following up without resolution.
